title: TactusScore procedures write score-wide model controls to root
description:
Feature: TactusScore model control retargeting
  Scenario: Score-wide model controls are written to TactusScore root
    Given a TactusScore YAML and a model retarget includes reasoning_effort, verbosity, temperature, and max_tokens
    When Plexus generates the candidate YAML
    Then all score-wide controls are written to the TactusScore root
    And ClassifyProcedure code is not modified for score-wide controls

  Scenario: Existing ClassifyProcedure overrides are preserved
    Given a TactusScore YAML already has ClassifyProcedure-local model controls
    When Plexus retargets score-wide model defaults
    Then the local ClassifyProcedure override remains unchanged
    And the root defaults apply only where local overrides are absent

  Scenario: Existing TactusScore YAML remains loadable
    Given an existing TactusScore YAML with supported root or local model fields
    When Plexus loads and retargets the score
    Then the procedure preserves unrelated score content and only changes requested model-control fields

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Planning complete. Implementation should follow the Tactus precedence chain: local config overrides TactusScore root/runtime defaults, then provider defaults.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implemented and verified. TactusScore now passes root max_tokens and temperature to TactusRuntime; frontier and retarget procedures write score-wide Tactus controls to root and preserve local ClassifyProcedure overrides.
